extortion.description: InnoPlastics AG, InnoRecycling AG, Sammelsack.chOne group of companies, three sister companies and a vision of closed plastic cycles in Switzerland. The three companies play the following roles:sammelsack.ch is the collection system for household plastics.InnoRecycling AG feeds the plastics into the right recycling channels.InnoPlastics AG processes the plastic waste into high-quality regranulates.In their commitment to closing the loop, the three companies live by their vision and individual missions and values.
